summary: SINGLE_FOCUS LEFT: dartboard with 4 color-coded rings; 150 precomputed Gaussian dart hits (σ=0.6) drop via ValueTracker t_tr; always_redraw colors each hit by its ring. RIGHT axes plot empirical P(|hit|<1.0) YELLOW vs theoretical 1-exp(-1/(2σ²)) GREEN dashed. Live count + empirical vs theory.
